tools.name: Google Veo 3
tools.shortDesc: Google's flagship AI video generator — native 4K, synchronized audio, and best-in-class realism.
tools.fullDesc: Google Veo 3.1 is the current gold standard for AI video generation. Released January 2026, it produces native 4K video with synchronized audio directly from text prompts. Exceptional character consistency, realistic physics, and prompt adherence make it the top choice for cinematic content creation.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="1-13">Veo 3.1 (latest) and Veo 3.1 Fast (latest)</cite> via API; <cite index="1-13">Veo 3, Veo 3 Fast</cite> also available

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="1-12">Google DeepMind's advanced AI video generation model that creates high-quality videos from text prompts or images</cite>. <cite index="1-9">Veo 3.1 improves on Veo 3 with richer native audio including natural conversations and sound effects, better image-to-video with simultaneous audio generation, enhanced realism and character consistency, and improved narrative control with better cinematic style understanding</cite>. <cite index="18-1">Veo 3.1 supports 4K resolution output, native vertical video support, and enhanced character consistency</cite>.

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="20-6">Veo 3.1 was first released in October 2025</cite>. <cite index="18-12,18-13">Google DeepMind rolled out a significant update to Veo 3.1 on January 13, 2026, introducing 4K resolution output, native vertical video support, and enhanced consistency features</cite>.

info.label: Pricing

tools.name: GPT-5
tools.shortDesc: OpenAI's flagship 2026 model — 400K context, native multimodal, computer use, and configurable reasoning.
tools.fullDesc: GPT-5 represents a decisive leap over the GPT-4 era. Released throughout 2025 and into 2026, it features configurable reasoning effort, native multimodal input (text, image, audio), a 400K context window, and native computer use. The March 2026 GPT-5.4 release unified general-purpose and coding lines into a single flagship model.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="9-1">GPT-5.4 is OpenAI's flagship model for complex reasoning and coding</cite>. <cite index="11-10">Both the standard gpt-5.4 and the premium gpt-5.4-pro model IDs are available</cite>. <cite index="14-10">GPT-5.4 is also available as a reasoning model (GPT-5.4 Thinking)</cite>.

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="14-11">The API version of the model is available with context windows as large as 1 million tokens</cite>.

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="5-1">GPT-5.4 API pricing is $2.50 input / $0.25 cached input / $15.00 output per 1M tokens</cite>. <cite index="3-1">GPT-5.4 Pro is $30.00 / $180.00</cite>.

features: Configurable reasoning effort — dial up compute for hard tasks, save on simple ones

400K context window — process entire codebases or long documents

GPT-5.4 unifies general-purpose and coding model lines
90%+ MMLU-Pro score — among the highest in the industry
Available via ChatGPT, API, Azure OpenAI, and Microsoft Copilot
